goal: Plan a trip to Rio de Janeiro

steps.title: extractConstraints
steps.details: Extract travel constraints from user prompt
steps.output: Duration: 3 days, Budget: STANDARD, Style: LEISURE

steps.title: calculateBudget
steps.output:

  * Misc: 45.00

Although Rio de Janeiro continues to be the preeminent icon of Brazil in the eyes of many in the world, in reality its location, architecture, inhabitants, and lifestyle make it highly unique when compared with other Brazilian cities, especially the countryâs capital of BrasÃ­lia or the much larger city of SÃ£o Paulo. The city of Rio de Janeiro became one of the 14 municipalities of the Metropolitan Region of Rio de Janeiro, or Greater Rio, and was designated the capital of the reorganized state.

In case you need help, Carioca's are nice, but make sure you are close to Zona Sul, where people are more friendly to tourists. Rio de Janeiro, called the "Marvellous City," charms everyone not only by its natural beauty but also by the friendliness of all Cariocas (born in Rio). The Rodoviaria Rio Novo station is the main bus terminal in Rio de Janeiro and hosts the majority of long-distance buses. December to March: Undoubtedly, the best time to visit Rio de Janeiro is between December and March, when the weather is optimum for exploring the cityâs beaches. For more information on Rio de Janeiroâs weather and when to go, check out some tipsÂ here.
